>> Push. Push.

>> My lady.
>> It's born. It's born.

Calidori has descended.

>> My lady, you gave birth to a little
prince.
My lady,
she has passed away.
>> My lady,
>> the child lost his mother and has no

My lady.
Welcome host. You are now bound to the

that you only had feelings for me. Is
that true or false?
>> A ruler's word is law. But you never
tried. So, how can you prove that a
ruler's word is law?
>> Are you willing to?
>> Since I'm about to leave the palace, not
sleeping with you feels like a bit of a
waste. Actually, I want to know if your
majesty is really incapable or not.
Your majesty,
let's do it again.
After I leave the palace, I might not be
able to find a perfect man like this.
Right.
>> Water.
I need water.
>> Your Majesty, have you rested enough?
Why don't we go for another round?
The bed is about to collapse.
>> Your majesty, you must understand. I
have endless energy. You know,
>> by the mandate of heaven, the emperor
decrees. Laura Lake is both virtuous and
capable, possessing a noble disposition,
and is concerned for the welfare of the
people and the nation. She has offered
improved crop strains, achieving merits
for the present age and benefits for
generations to come. She is a model for
all women and embodies the grace of a
great empress. She is hereby appointed
as the empress of the central palace and
granted residence at the skyworm keep.
This is the decree.
The imperial son Sha Fay is blessed with
both good fortune and wisdom and
possesses extraordinary natural
intelligence. He is filial, fraternal,
loyal and trustworthy. He is hereby
appointed as the crown prince to assume
the position of the eastern palace to
ensure the continuity of the imperial
line and to secure the hearts of the
four seas. This is the decree.
A brilliant aura covers the land. This
is a very auspicious sign.
Congratulations, host, on the perfect
completion of your mission. 10,000
points have been added to your account.
Please check your balance. Host, please
choose. Do you want to stay in the
palace or live outside?
>> If I leave the palace,
will the people here not remember me at
all?
>> Host, please don't worry. Once you
choose to live outside the palace, the
memories of everyone who knew you will
be replaced. Even if you meet them later
on, they will never recognize you.
Am I really a person of this era?
>> Countdown to the ending begins. We have
reached the final countdown for leaving
the palace life. 23 hours and 59 minutes
left.
>> By the grace of heaven, the emperor
decrees. The former consorts residing in
the cold palace, having contributed to
cultivating potato seeds, are hereby
pardoned of their past offenses. Each
shall be granted 500 tales and shall
leave the palace to return home to live
out their remaining years. Upon
returning home, they shall not remarry,
nor shall they commit any act that may
bring shame to the imperial family. This
is the decree.
>> I reverently receive the edict, thanking
his majesty. Long live his majesty.
>> You may all rise. Starting today, you
are all free. You may return to your
respective homes. Since you were
pardoned due to your service, I believe
your families will be overjoyed. Thank
you, Will, for delivering the edict.
>> Not at all. You all certainly still have
things to discuss with the empress, so I
won't waste any more of your time. I
must return and report to the emperor.
>> Congratulations to all of you,
>> your highness. Thank you.
>> We met when we were nothing. I will
always be your Laura. Though the cold
palace offers some freedom, however, the
freedom within these four palace walls
is not the same as the limitless freedom
outside. I actually want to let go of
everything and leave with you all.
>> Laura, I know you are no ordinary
person. We are all mere mortals, but you
are not. I've decided to buy a little
place outside the capital with a few
acres of land. A dozen of us old gals
will play mahong, tend our gardens,
dance a bit, and live life without a
care. But for peace and prosperity, for
calm across the realm and the people's
well-being, we need you and his majesty
to make it happen. Laura, because of
you, we have today with you in the
palace. Happy souls will only grow in
number. Sunshine will bathe whole palace
and you will be that light shining on
every citizen of Calidori. Don't sell
yourself short. You can still grow into
someone even better.
>> Mia, I want to stay. Can a destiny
already chosen still be rewritten?
>> Host can rewrite her ending, but only
gets one shot. Once the ending changes,
Mia will have to leave the system for
good.
>> I'm sure. Rewrite it.
The ending is set a new. Mia must leave
ahead of time. I've loved spending this
past year sharing so many moments with
you. May the days ahead be smooth
sailing and worry-f free.
>> And may your system only grow better and
better and stay forever bug free.
>> Thank you for the blessing.
>> To honor heaven and earth.
>> To honor heaven and earth.
>> To safeguard the people.
>> To safeguard the people.
>> To bring peace for all ages.
Two
>> kitty.
>> Mother,
>> from now on I will never leave you
again.
>> Since you are now my empress, you must
protect me. Well, you promised me that.
>> Who said I was going to protect you?
>> Your hands.
>> Since you rescued me, you must take full
responsibility for me.
>> Gross.
